zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Ufford於1350年出生在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德時，他的父親Sir Edmund de Ufford41歲，母親Sibilla de Pierrepoint25歲。他於大約1370年與Eleanor Felton在英國素可阿盧德爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1393年在英國英格蘭素福爾可萊塔姆享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Ufford于1350年出生在英国諾福爾可霍斯福德时，他的父亲Sir Edmund de Ufford41岁，母亲Sibilla de Pierrepoint25岁。他于大约1370年与Eleanor Felton在英国素可阿盧德爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1393年在英国英格兰素福爾可萊塔姆享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Ufford was born in 1350, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Edmund de Ufford, was 41 and his mother, Sibilla de Pierrepoint, was 25. He married Eleanor Felton about 1370, in Arundel, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1393, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Ufford est né en 1350, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund de Ufford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Sibilla de Pierrepoint, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Felton environ 1370, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1393, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Ufford 1350 in Horsford, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund de Ufford 41 und seine Mutter Sibilla de Pierrepoint 25. Er hat um 1370 in Arundel, Sussex, England Eleanor Felton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1393 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Ufford è nato il nel 1350 nel Horsford, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund de Ufford, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Sibilla de Pierrepoint, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Felton circa 1370, nel Arundel, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1393, nel Wrentham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Uffordが1350年にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund de Uffordは41歳，母Sibilla de Pierrepointは25歳であった。約1370年にイギリススセックスアルンデルでEleanor Feltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1393年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウレンサムで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Ufford(이)가 1350년 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund de Ufford(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla de Pierrepoint(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 Eleanor Felton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 렌섬에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Ufford nasceu em 1350, em Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund de Ufford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Sibilla de Pierrepoint, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Felton aproximadamente 1370, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1393, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Ufford родился в 1350 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund de Ufford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Sibilla de Pierrepoint, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Felton около 1370 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1393 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Ufford nació en 1350, en Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund de Ufford, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Sibilla de Pierrepoint, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Eleanor Felton aproximadamente 1370, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1393, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
